text: Chapter 29 (Just Bobi) contains no load-bearing prose passages — composed entirely of notated chord-melody solo material under Mickey Baker's name, with chord symbols (G13b9, Cmaj7, Cmaj6, Cmaj9, Gm6, Fm9, and similar Upper-Partial voicings) annotated above the staff. It is the closing applied solo of the volume, embodying the method's full chord-form vocabulary in performance context.
